description_long: This is a sleek, freestanding digital kiosk with a tall, rectangular form and a large, vertically oriented touchscreen display dominating the front face. The kiosk is primarily black, with a smooth, glossy finish and rounded top corners, giving it a modern and professional appearance. The front display features a digital interface with a logo, text, and a sign-in prompt, suggesting interactive functionality. A small, square component, likely a card reader or sensor, is embedded on the right side of the display. The sides and rear are solid, unadorned, and flat, emphasizing the minimalist design. The base is wide and sturdy, providing stability for the upright structure.
description: A modern, black freestanding digital kiosk with a large touchscreen display and a sleek, minimalist design. The front features an interactive screen and a small embedded component, while the sides and back are plain and solid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large touchscreen display with digital signage and a small embedded component on the right.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the kiosk's slim profile and the depth of the base, with no visible features except the thickness.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid black surface with no visible openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the slim profile and base seen in view 1, with no additional features.
attribute_signage_type: digital display integrated into the front structure, showing a logo and the text 'SIGN UP HERE'
attribute_roof_design: flat, seamless top with rounded corners, matching the kiosk's minimalist style
